## Summary

- 

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Refactor

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual browser check, if UI changed

## Privacy and scope checklist

- [ ] This PR does not include `.env`, `.vercel/`, local logs, local paths, tokens, private URLs, or account screenshots.
- [ ] This PR does not add real-money betting, deposits, withdrawals, gambling promotion, or gambling service integrations.
- [ ] Probability, payout, or rule changes are covered by tests or public references where practical.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for UI changes only if they do not contain sensitive information.
